Video.summary: This episode we make our way through Georgia, where we stop in Helen, Alpharetta and Atlanta!!
Video.title: "We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"

Image.alt: "We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"
"We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"
"We Crushed Them! Fishing the HEART of Georgia (Atlanta)"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through South Carolina, where we stop in Clemson, Travelers Rest and Charleston!!
Video.title: "Lowcountry Buzzer Beater! (Redfish on Fly)"

Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: Florida WaterSports Jeff Lange & Capt Justin head out of PCB in the wee morning hours hoping to land a limit of tasty table fare before the window of opportunity closes. Pro tip: Electric reels save shoulders.
Video.title: "We’re gonna need a bigger cooler."

Video.summary: It's 2016 and Mark heads down to Kansas for an early season Muzzleloader Whitetail hunt with Salt River Outfitters. It was hot in the stand with little deer movement until the moon phase switched and - one of the bucks Mark had been looking for stepped out. Kansas is one of those states that has an early Muzzleloader season that opens in September, and if you can get the weather and the moon to align you can catch a big deer on his feet in daylight.
Video.title: "Giant 15 Point Kansas Whitetail, Early Season Hunt"

Image.alt: "Giant 15 Point Kansas Whitetail, Early Season Hunt"
"Giant 15 Point Kansas Whitetail, Early Season Hunt"
"Giant 15 Point Kansas Whitetail, Early Season Hunt"

Video.summary: Kylee Short, an Orlando based bass angler, shares how she discovered fishing later in life. This LBP Spotlight highlights her journey on the water and strong family support.
Video.title: "Kylee Short"

Video.summary: The "Trained Assassins" are back and it’s turkey season in the Midwest. In this first episode, Slade, Blake, and Ryan start in Missouri, run into some trouble, but end up getting it done on the first leg of the 2024 turkey tour.
Video.title: "Midwest Turkey Tour 2024"

Video.summary: This week we're joined by our good friend and Worship Leader, Rob Key. A tremendous musical talent that's chased the country music dream, but found his calling as worship leader at Taylorsville Community Church. Rob's love for serving the Lord is his top priority, but he certainly enjoys the great outdoors and especially doing a little fishing.
Video.title: "Worship, Music, and Bassin'"

Video.summary: The bond between and parent and child can grow in many ways, but nothing compares to the bond shared when hunting. The annual Father-Son hunt at FE Hill Outfitters has becoming a tradition for Heath and his son Gavin and in 2021, Gavin was able to take his largest buck to date, with his dad Heath behind the camera.
Video.title: "Father - Son Tradition"

Video.summary: We kick off Season 2 in Tennessee where we stop in Nashville, Townsend, and Johnson City!!
Video.title: "Traveling Over 2,000 Miles to Fish HERE!"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through the mountains of western North Carolina, where we stop in Asheville and Cashiers!!
Video.title: "Dry Fly Fishing HEAVEN (Wild Trout)"

Video.summary: Human encroachment and pressure from poaching are the greatest threats to wildlife in Africa. Dan Cabela has traveled to Tanzania to see how Robin Hurt safaris manages two large conservation areas in the face of these daily challenges.
Video.title: "Anti-poaching in Tanzania"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff wade into the flooded timber of the legendary Coca-Cola Woods, where mallards drop through the treetops in waves. Amidst echoes of calling and wingbeats, they experience one of America’s most iconic duck hunts.
Video.title: "The Coca-Cola Woods"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff scour the rugged mountains of southern Arizona in search of the elusive Coues deer, known to hunters as the “Grey Ghost.” Through scorching sun and shifting winds, they test their skill and patience chasing one of North America’s most elusive big game animals.
Video.title: "Arizona Coues Deer"

Video.summary: The Green Way team continue their African journey with hunts for both the majestic Kudu and elusive Golden Wildebeest. The experience comes full circle when the meat from these animals is donated to local schoolchildren, who receive not only fresh meals but also school supplies and sweets that light up the village.
Video.title: "Africa Part 2"

Video.summary: Slade and the crew are finally able to catch up with these elk despite some pretty terrible weather conditions. It comes right down to the wire! Don’t miss it.
Video.title: "Montrose Elk Pt. 2"

Video.summary: Slade takes us around the hometown hunting grounds and shows us some of the last bits of preparation for the season. An old buck that’s been showing up on camera at night decides to daylight and pays the price.
Video.title: "Amos Moses"

Video.summary: Slade and Caleb head back to Missouri to catch the end of bow season, - and the start of rifle. Slade arrows a great buck (twice), and we preview the latest property Slade & Co. purchased in MO.
Video.title: "Missouri Project 2024 Part 1"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade ends the saga with a deer he has watched for a few years, Pope. On a previous episode you saw Slade put in all of the work with feeder and food plot strategy to make the stars align. Make sure you watch that episode as well to see the behind the scenes work it took to bring Pope to 25 yards.
Video.title: "Pope"

Video.summary: TA Mahoney is a classic mom and pop store known for going the extra mile and treating everyday people like family. Keep an eye on Mike though, you never know what kind of prank is up his sleeve.
Video.title: "Mike Mahoney"

Video.summary: Josh and his wife Anna own the most prolific tackle shop in Fort Walton Beach. Josh's family eats, sleeps and breathes fishing.
Video.title: "Josh Calhoon"

Video.summary: Meet just a few of the amazing crew members of the Old Salt Board of Directors. This nonprofit is more than just a fishing group. They make a difference in their community.
Video.title: "Old Salts"

Video.summary: We join Denny McMahan on this episode at the legendary Thumbtack Ranch in South Texas. Denny was nominated by his wife for Bucks for the Brave program hosted by Trinity Oaks. After dedicating his life to service in the US Army and law enforcement, he now continues the mission by teaching at the police academy. Denny is a true hero in his community - someone who sacrifices his time, his well being, and his life in service to others, never asking for anything in return.
Video.title: "Bucks for the Brave"

Video.summary: A recap of this season's favorite fish!
Video.title: "Season 4 Wrap Up"

Video.summary: Capt. Blair meets up with Capt. Ron Ryals to fish the phosphate pits of Bienville outdoors, an amazing spot for hunting and trophy bass catching.
Video.title: "Bassn' In Bienville"

Video.summary: Capt. Blair goes back to Marco Island with Capt. Chris Broome to tackle the beautiful inshore spots before heading offshore the next day.
Video.title: "Marco Island 2"

Video.summary: David Blanton and Mike Chamberlin have 2 incredible late season hunts in South Dakota. A flock comes into the hen decoy and a Jake trying to breed the decoy drives the Toms insane!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "David South Dakota"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor use Lowrance Active Target all day to find fish, first targeting bridge tarpon then finding a variety of species in Florida Bay mullet muds.
Video.title: "Bridge to Mullet Muds"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor chase Tarpon of all sizes around Florida Bay and the Everglades.
Video.title: "Tarpon Bites"

Video.summary: When temperatures plummet and the landscape is buried in snow, the whitetail deer’s true resilience is put to the test.
Video.title: "Surviving Winter"

Video.summary: The boys are in Missouri at the Raven and they are ready to burn some powder and get rifle season kicked off at the Raven.
Video.title: "Rifle Camp At The Raven"

Video.summary: Josh Kinser from Big and J introduced his daughters to hunting throughout South TX. With trips earlier in the year cancelled, Josh and Hattie were invited to join the TTHA crew at G2 ranch. The first night of the hunt proved to be a success for Hattie, wrapping a TX tag around her biggest buck. Josh and Hattie will have memories to last a lifetime after this hunt!
Video.title: "Start Them Young"

Video.summary: Craig Harrison and Rusty Smith from Caza Outdoors (Los Cazadores, Pnuma, - Trophy Scan, Heated Core & more) hunt with the TTHA crew at the G2 Ranch in Pearsall, TX. Sharing a deer camp with friends is a time honored tradition across the country, and one that we hold near and dear to our hearts here at Texas Trophy Hunters!
Video.title: "Deer Camp with Friends (part 1)"

Video.summary: Throughout the years, our friendships have been forged in deer camps across the country, and this week is a continuation of some of those times. This week, we have Dave Peterson and Mike Winkler from Do All Outdoors and Jurassic Rock in camp with us. When all is said and done, we even got to do a little hunting ourselves and create more memories that will last a lifetime
Video.title: "Deer Camp with Friends (part 2)"

Video.summary: Capt. Blair Wiggins heads out the farthest he’s ever been offshore with Capt. Mike Avanon & Capt. Chris Broome in search of a species he’s never caught before.
Video.title: "Another One For The Bucket List"

Video.summary: Kyle explores the Great Lakes on his Sea-Doo in search of walleye and lake trout.
Video.title: "Great Lakes Extreme Fishing"

Video.summary: Realtree’s Anthony Virga takes us to his home turf in New Jersey and shows us two epic turkey hunts back-to-back!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Jersey Gobblers"

Video.summary: David Blanton and Mike Chamberlin head west for an unforgettable Merriam turkey hunt in the Black Hills of Wyoming and Montana. From breathtaking western landscapes to heart-pounding close encounters, the Merriams put on a show as the team works the birds across big country.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Black Hills Gobblers"

Video.summary: Colton Jordan is on a mission to complete a single season grand slam with his big brother Tyler. The two head to South Florida for the opening weekend of Turkey Season in hopes of harvesting one of these beautiful black winged swamp birds.
Video.title: "Jordan Osceolas"

Video.summary: With Meredith McCord halfway around the world, Capt. Justin Leake gives show producer Chris Hermans his first shot at landing a tarpon after filming them for 9 seasons. Does art imitate life?
Video.title: "Tarpon Producer"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin Leake joins some old friends on board the Fall Line in hopes of scoring big in the Bay Point Billfish Open. This trip will test the limits of all the anglers as the skilled captain and crew do the impossible in hopes of bringing home the prize.
Video.title: "Billfish Tourney"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin and Florida WaterSports pro Jeff Lange go deep off Panama City Beach to test the limits of a new battery powered reel. The results are surprising.
Video.title: "Electric Deep Drop"

Video.summary: When tarpon don’t cooperate, it’s time for Capt. Justin and friend Ethan Register to have a competition for dinner options in the gulf’s grocery store.
Video.title: "Once Upon a Wahoo"

Video.summary: With the fall of the Soviet Union, wildlife populations in Tajikistan were devastated, bringing some of their unique mountain species to the brink of extinction. With the help of funds generated through hunting, vast areas are now being conserved and protected. Dan Cabela explores this conservation success.
Video.title: "Tajikistan, a Mountainous Land"

Video.summary: This week, we reflect on a tragic and sad memory in our lives as we remember a dear childhood friend of my son Nick, Nathan Wimsatt. Our families have been close for man years and shared a lot of time together around the soccer field, vacations, fishing trips, and much more. Nathan passed in a tragic car accident at only 18 years on April 29th, 2023. This week his Dad Brian is joining me on Lake Taylorsville where we'll share some memories and celebrate Nathan's life...that ended way to soon!
Video.title: "Life Is A Highway"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared and Capt. Jake Leon hop in the bay boat in search of a - back country slam.
Video.title: "Bay Boat Slam"

Video.summary: Follow along as Mark Peterson travels to Tanzania to hunt the Eastern and Western White-Bearded Wildebeest. These animals are known for their distinctive white beards and large horns, making them a sought-after trophy for hunters on an African safari. Mark sets out on an exciting and thrilling adventure to track down these elusive creatures in the plains of Tanzania.
Video.title: "Hunting White-Bearded Wildebeest - Tanzania"

Video.summary: Welcome to spring gobbler season. Join us as Gavin heads to his home state of New York to chase gobblers on familiar ground with familiar faces.
Video.title: The - "Hunting With Dad OPENING DAY | NEW YORK Turkey Hunting"

Image.alt: The - "Hunting With Dad OPENING DAY | NEW YORK Turkey Hunting"
The - "Hunting With Dad OPENING DAY | NEW YORK Turkey Hunting"
The - "Hunting With Dad OPENING DAY | NEW YORK Turkey Hunting"

Video.summary: The boys are on the Raven in Missouri trying to plant 50 acres of Big Tine food plots in 5 days before heading out west to kick off the hunting season.
Video.title: "50 Acres In 5 Days"

Video.summary: We were honored to be a part of the Gold Star Youth Outdoors Turkey Hunt at Iron Horse Farms in Alabama. Cole Barthel and Bryan Brown were able to get Charlie Willington his first turkey. Be sure to check out Gold Star Youth Outdoors and Iron Horse Farms.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Gold Star Youth Turkey"

Video.summary: Realtree's David Blanton talks about some of his essential turkey hunting gear. These are the items that he has found to be the handiest throughout the years.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "David Blanton's Turkey Gear Must-Haves | Turkey Gear Essentials | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "David Blanton's Turkey Gear Must-Haves | Turkey Gear Essentials | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "David Blanton's Turkey Gear Must-Haves | Turkey Gear Essentials | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "David Blanton's Turkey Gear Must-Haves | Turkey Gear Essentials | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: We are blessed for the opportunity to follow along the guys from Trinity Oaks for Bucks for the Brave. The men and women that served in our armed services and as first responders, had jobs that required the, to be willing to sacrifice their own lives every day, in order to protect or save someone else's. Not many of us can say that, nor understand what that truly means. The things they've had to see, and the sacrifices they've made in their daily lives, can have a profound impact on them. Trinity Oaks' Bucks for the Brave platform allows the loved ones and communities that support these heroes to share their stories and unite us all in honoring and recognizing their service to our great nation. We are proud to continue to be a part of this incredible program, getting these heroes in the outdoors for the hunt of a lifetime.
Video.title: "Trinity Oaks - Bucks for the Brave"

Video.summary: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.
Video.title: "Walk, Ride, Rodeo…Hunt"

Video.summary: This spring, our crew was able to dive into some turkey hunting at the G2 ranch with long time TTHA Members Mike Reeber and Dan Marcasol. After a slow start, the crew was finally able to connect on a great Rio Tom and a few hogs. Learning and sharing the stories of TTHA members is something we strive to do each year.
Video.title: "G2 Rios"

Video.summary: We love our members. We spent some time in camp with Ron Chandler. Ron Recently renewed his TTHA Membership in 2022 and was awarded a member hunt for 2023. We spend time reflecting on what hunting means to Ron and spending time in camp at G2 with hunters alike.
Video.title: "Member Hunt"

Video.summary: From time to time you have moments that will change the way think about something. That is what happened for us while hunting the Scimitar Oryx with Republic Outdoors. Hunting is more than harvesting animals, it’s conservation, and in this story, we learn how a species nearly extinct gets another chance to live.
Video.title: "A Story Of Restoration"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!
Video.title: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Image.alt: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade takes us through his new investment property, and breaks down - what’s involved in taking a raw land tract and creating extremely desirable turn-key - hunting properties. - Caleb and Slade double up on some Wilkinson County gobblers for Calebs first turkey - kill ever.
Video.title: "Flips And Flops"

Video.summary: In this episode Slade takes Bentley on his very first duck hunt. Slade also gets to take a trip to duck hunting paradise with some great buddies of his. This episode is all about having a great time with great friends.
Video.title: "Duck Land Man"

Video.summary: It’s Caleb’s turn to hunt and Slade gets behind the camera. They encounter their target buck, but end up getting a shot at a different buck, and it’s a big boy.
Video.title: Hunting Land Man - "Missouri Project 2024 Part 2"

Video.summary: Spring Thunder's Phillip Culpepper turkey hunts Wisconsin for late-season gobblers with United Country's Travis Hamele. They have an incredible hunt, and turkeys fall from the skies.
Video.title: "An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"

Image.alt: "An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"
"An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"
"An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"

Video.summary: Realtree's David Blanton self-films an epic turkey hunt in southern Alabama. Don't miss this hunt. It's packed full of incredible gobbler action.
Video.title: "Unreal Self-filmed Alabama Turkey Hunt"

Video.summary: In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew travels to Kodiak Island, Alaska, in pursuit of blacktail deer in some of the most remote terrain they’ve faced. After a multi-day journey by air - and sea, they arrive in a landscape defined by steep mountains, thick brush, and ever-changing weather. Once on the ground, the team confirms their setups and puts Winchester’s Supreme Long Range ammunition to the test as they glass expansive hillsides, pick apart coastal terrain, and carefully plan each move. From quick opportunities along the shoreline to calculated stalks in the high country, every moment demands focus and precision. Against the backdrop of Alaska’s wild beauty, this episode highlights the challenge, the strategy, and the performance it takes to capitalize when the opportunity finally comes together.
Video.title: "Alaska Supreme"
